hazards.source: Asian Development Bank (ADB) Climate Risk Country Profile: Viet Nam
hazards.description: Intense monsoonal rainfall combined with an aging, overloaded drainage system and land subsidence causes severe inundation in low-lying districts.
hazards.proportionExposedRange: 25-35% of the city area during peak events
hazards.impact: Significant disruption to economic activity, damage to critical infrastructure, and increased risk of waterborne diseases.

hazards.source: Vietnam Ministry of Natural Resources and Environment (MONRE) Climate Scenarios
hazards.description: Seasonal high tides and upstream discharge from the Saigon and Dong Nai river systems lead to overbank flooding.
hazards.proportionExposedRange: 10-20% of the city area, concentrated along river corridors
hazards.impact: Direct damage to industrial facilities, loss of agricultural yields, and contamination of municipal water sources.

hazards.otherHazardDetails: Compounded by storm surge from tropical cyclones and sea level rise.
hazards.source: Climate Central Sea Level Rise Projections
hazards.description: Accelerating sea level rise poses a long-term threat to coastal districts, especially Can Gio.
hazards.proportionExposedRange: 5-10% of total city area, but nearly 100% of the Can Gio district
hazards.impact: Permanent loss of land, salinization of freshwater aquifers and agricultural land, and damage to coastal protection infrastructure.

goals.description: Protect major industrial parks and residential areas from a 1-in-100-year river flood event by 2035 through a comprehensive system of dikes and sluice gates.
Reduce urban flood inundation depth by 30% in 13 core districts by 2030 through upgraded drainage capacity and the development of water retention areas.

actions.title: Integrated Urban Drainage and Flood Management Master Plan

status.otherStatusDetails: Seeking international development bank co-financing for several key components.

actions.title: Green Infrastructure Incentive Program for Private Development

status.otherStatusDetails: Pilot program active in Thu Duc City and District 7.
